name: simulacrum
description: An AI-powered assistant for FoundryVTT campaign document management

scripts.deploy:module: HASH=$(date +%s | sha256sum | cut -c1-8) && TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) && echo "// Auto-generated build info - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\nexport const BUILD_HASH = '$HASH';\nexport const BUILD_TIME = '$TIMESTAMP';" > scripts/build-info.js && npm run package:module && ZIP=$(ls -t dist/simulacrum-*.zip | head -n 1) && echo "Deploying $ZIP (hash: $HASH) to remote..." && scp "$ZIP" ${DEPLOY_HOST}:~/foundrydata/module.zip && ssh ${DEPLOY_HOST} "mkdir -p ~/foundrydata/data/Data/modules/simulacrum && unzip -o ~/foundrydata/module.zip -d ~/foundrydata/data/Data/modules/simulacrum && rm ~/foundrydata/module.zip && systemctl --user restart foundryvtt2.service && echo 'Foundry VTT restarted. Deploy hash: $HASH'"

author: Your Name
